script.name: Samurai
script.text: {blip:1}Here we go, Evil Magistrate!{nl}We settle this today!

script.name: Kurumi
script.text: I have to do much, much better.{nl}All I can do is practice.

script.name: Kurumi
script.text: Here we go, Evil Magistrate!{nl}We settle this today!

Intro_Start.text: {setState:scenePrefix,Intro}{playVideo:intro}
{bg:JoyPolis}{showTextbox}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}September 17, 10:34 PM{nl}Joypolis

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {startBGM:investigation,false}{blip:1}{color:lightblue}(My name is Phoenix Wright.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I'm a defense attorney at the Wright & Co. Law Offices.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I received a request from Maggey Byrde,{nl}{p:300}a suspect in a murder case...)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(And came here to Joypolis.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(Maggey isn't the kind of person who would commit murder.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I have to find the truth and clear her name no matter what.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(To do that,{nl}I can't overlook even the smallest detail.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I'll write down all the {color:red}information{color:lightblue}{nl}I notice in the {color:red}Court Record{color:lightblue}.)

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{hideCharacter}{hideTextbox}{fadeInCharacter:300}{p:200}{showTextbox}*sigh*{p:200}...

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Edgeworth["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}Detective Gumshoe. Give us your summary of the case immediately.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{fadeOutBg}(That's Miles Edgeworth.{nl}A prosecutor from the district prosecutor's office.)

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {fadeInBg}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead2"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter}{p:200}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{showTextbox}{color:white}Y-Yessir...

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{fadeOutBg}(And that's Detective Dick Gumshoe.{nl}A detective at the local precinct.)

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {showEvidenceIcon:left,Kurumi}{color:white}{fadeInBg}{sprite:Gumshoe["Thinking"]}The victim is Kurumi Nakaki.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: She worked here at Joypolis as a suit actress for the Steel Samurai show, sir.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The body was discovered at 10:05 PM.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {hideEvidenceIcon}The estimated time of death is between 9:30 PM and 10:30 PM.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Edgeworth["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}And...{p:500} the suspect is...

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead2"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter}{p:200}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}... Maggey Byrde,{p:300} who was working here part-time as a security guard,{p:200} sir...

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutBg}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Maggey["Officer"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{p:200}{sprite:Maggey["Salute_Officer"]}{sprite:Maggey["Officer"]}{color:lightblue}(Maggey used to be a police officer and was Detective Gumshoe's junior.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(Detective Gumshoe always looked out for her.{nl}This must be really hard on him.)

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{p:10}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInBg}{fadeInCharacter:300}{color:white}It seems Maggey pushed the victim off the 4th floor of the event hall...

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Edgeworth["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}Who was the first to discover the body?

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}The event hall manager for this amusement park,{nl}Frank Shawit, sir.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Edgeworth["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{sprite:Edgeworth["Smug"]}I see. This is a truly simple case.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: {sprite:Edgeworth["Angry"]}Because decisive evidence pointing to the defendant's guilt has already been found.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {flash}{playSound:damage}What!?

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(No, I can't let him get to me.{nl}{p:300}No matter what evidence they have,{p:200} I can't lose.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I have to uncover the truth no matter what{nl}{p:300}and prove Maggey's innocence!)
{setState:intro_done,true}{hideTextbox}{stopBGM:true}{p:500}{hideCharacter}{fadeOutFg}{fadeBg:phoenixMove}{playSound:jingle}{sectionEnd}{skip:0}
